industry.valueProp: Fiduciary financial planning specialized for outdoor-industry founders

recentSignals.signal: Hired their first compliance lead in October
recentSignals.implication: Building out compliance infrastructure suggests AUM growth and regulatory maturity — typical trigger for compliance workflow tooling.

recentSignals.signal: Three open operations roles posted last week
recentSignals.implication: Operations team scaling. Workflow tooling decisions likely being made in this 60-90 day window.

recentSignals.signal: Recent expansion to Denver and Salt Lake City
recentSignals.implication: Multi-office growth introduces process-consistency challenges that operational tooling addresses.

buyingCommittee.likelyTitle: Executive Assistant or Chief of Staff

culturalFit.evidence: Sector-specialized RIA serving outdoor-industry founders implies values-aligned positioning. Geographic expansion to Denver/SLC reinforces outdoor-ecosystem identity. Tone should be substantive and values-aware, not corporate.

tierRationale: Three converging signals (compliance hire, operations role openings, multi-office expansion) align directly with the offer's target trigger. Buying committee is identifiable. Cultural fit suggests they'll respond to a substantive, non-templated approach.
outreachAngle: Reference the October compliance hire and the open ops roles together: 'Most RIAs we work with bring on a compliance lead and discover their workflow tooling can't keep up with the new oversight cadence — happened with [reference firm] last quarter. Worth comparing notes with Marcus before your new hire is fully ramped?' This is falsifiable (they did hire), specific (compliance + ops), and offers value (peer comparison) before asking for time.
